title: rubus × castoris
intro: Rubus × castoris, also known as the American black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × castoris include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which makes it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × castoris include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and certain types of cancer, as well as improving cognitive function and immune system function. Rubus × castoris is often prepared as a tea, jam, or supplement, and its herbal preparations have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
